title: Password Generator
description: Generate strong, secure random passwords instantly. Customize length, include symbols, numbers, and uppercase letters.
shortDescription: Create strong, random passwords in one click.

faqItems.question: How secure are the generated passwords?
faqItems.answer: Passwords are generated entirely in your browser using the Web Crypto API. They are never sent to any server, making them extremely secure.

faqItems.question: What is a strong password?
faqItems.answer: A strong password is at least 16 characters long and includes a mix of uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special symbols.

faqItems.question: How often should I change my password?
faqItems.answer: Security experts recommend changing passwords every 3-6 months, or immediately if you suspect a breach.

title: Word Counter
description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in your text. Get reading time estimates and keyword density instantly.
shortDescription: Count words, characters, and reading time in seconds.

faqItems.question: Does this tool save my text?
faqItems.answer: No. All processing happens locally in your browser. Your text is never sent to any server.

faqItems.question: How is reading time calculated?
faqItems.answer: Reading time is calculated based on an average reading speed of 200 words per minute.

faqItems.question: What counts as a word?
faqItems.answer: Any sequence of characters separated by spaces or punctuation counts as one word.

title: Color Palette Generator
description: Generate beautiful, harmonious color palettes for your design projects. Create complementary, triadic, or analogous color schemes instantly.
shortDescription: Generate stunning color palettes for your designs.

faqItems.question: What color formats are supported?
faqItems.answer: Palettes are displayed in HEX, RGB, and HSL formats. Click any value to copy it to your clipboard.

faqItems.question: What is a complementary color scheme?
faqItems.answer: Complementary colors are opposite each other on the color wheel, creating high contrast and vibrant combinations.

faqItems.question: Can I export the palette?
faqItems.answer: Yes, you can copy individual HEX codes or copy the entire palette as a JSON array.

title: Pomodoro Timer
description: Boost your productivity with the Pomodoro Technique. Customize work sessions, short breaks, and long breaks to maximize your focus.
shortDescription: Stay focused with a customizable Pomodoro timer.

faqItems.question: What is the Pomodoro Technique?
faqItems.answer: The Pomodoro Technique is a time management method that uses 25-minute focused work sessions separated by short breaks to improve productivity.

faqItems.question: Can I customize the timer durations?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can set custom durations for work sessions (default 25 min), short breaks (5 min), and long breaks (15 min).

faqItems.question: Will the timer notify me when a session ends?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The timer plays a sound notification and shows a browser notification when each session ends.

title: Readability Checker
description: Analyze your text's readability with Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, and SMOG scores. Improve your writing clarity and reach a wider audience.
shortDescription: Measure how easy your text is to read.

faqItems.question: What is a Flesch Reading Ease score?
faqItems.answer: Flesch Reading Ease scores range from 0-100. Scores above 60 are considered easy to read, suitable for general audiences. Below 30 is considered very difficult.

faqItems.question: What grade level should my content target?
faqItems.answer: For web content targeting a general audience, aim for a 7th-8th grade reading level (Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level 7-8).

faqItems.question: What is a Gunning Fog Index?
faqItems.answer: The Gunning Fog Index estimates the years of education needed to understand the text. A score of 12 means a high school graduate can understand it.

title: UUID Generator
description: Generate random UUIDs (v4) and ULIDs instantly. Bulk generate multiple unique identifiers for development and testing.
shortDescription: Generate unique IDs for your projects instantly.

faqItems.question: What is a UUID?
faqItems.answer: A UUID (Universally Unique Identifier) is a 128-bit label used to uniquely identify objects in software systems. UUID v4 is randomly generated.

faqItems.question: Are generated UUIDs truly unique?
faqItems.answer: UUID v4 has 2^122 possible values, making collisions astronomically unlikely. They are safe to use as unique identifiers.

faqItems.question: What is the difference between UUID and ULID?
faqItems.answer: ULIDs are lexicographically sortable and contain a timestamp component, making them useful for database records where ordering by creation time matters.

title: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
description: Encode and decode text and files to/from Base64 format instantly. Essential for web development, API testing, and data encoding tasks.
shortDescription: Encode and decode Base64 strings in your browser.

faqItems.question: What is Base64 encoding?
faqItems.answer: Base64 is a binary-to-text encoding scheme that represents binary data using 64 ASCII characters. It is commonly used to embed images in HTML and transmit data over text-based protocols.

faqItems.question: Is Base64 a form of encryption?
faqItems.answer: No. Base64 is encoding, not encryption. It can be easily decoded by anyone. Never use it to secure sensitive data.

faqItems.question: Can I encode binary files?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can upload any file and this tool will output its Base64 encoded string, which you can use in CSS data URLs or HTML img tags.

title: JSON Formatter & Validator
description: Format, beautify, and validate JSON data online. Minify JSON for production or pretty-print it for debugging. Instant syntax error detection.
shortDescription: Format and validate JSON data instantly.

faqItems.question: What does JSON formatting do?
faqItems.answer: JSON formatting adds proper indentation and line breaks to minified JSON, making it human-readable. It is the reverse of JSON minification.

faqItems.question: Can this tool fix invalid JSON?
faqItems.answer: The tool detects and highlights syntax errors, but cannot automatically fix them. It will tell you the exact line and character where the error occurs.

faqItems.question: Is my JSON data safe?
faqItems.answer: Yes. All formatting happens locally in your browser. Your JSON data is never sent to our servers.

title: Markdown Preview
description: Write Markdown and see a live HTML preview instantly. Supports GitHub Flavored Markdown including tables, code blocks, and task lists.
shortDescription: Live Markdown editor with instant HTML preview.

faqItems.question: What Markdown features are supported?
faqItems.answer: Supports GitHub Flavored Markdown including headings, bold, italic, links, images, code blocks with syntax highlighting, tables, and task lists.

faqItems.question: Can I export the HTML output?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Click the 'Copy HTML' button to copy the rendered HTML to your clipboard, ready to paste into your project.

faqItems.question: Does this save my content?
faqItems.answer: Your content is saved to your browser's local storage automatically, so it persists between sessions. Nothing is sent to any server.

title: CSS Gradient Generator
description: Create beautiful CSS linear and radial gradients visually. Copy production-ready CSS code instantly for your web projects.
shortDescription: Create and copy CSS gradients in seconds.

faqItems.question: What types of gradients can I create?
faqItems.answer: You can create linear gradients (straight lines at any angle) and radial gradients (circular or elliptical from a center point).

faqItems.question: Is the generated CSS cross-browser compatible?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The generated CSS includes standard syntax that works in all modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge).

faqItems.question: Can I add more than two colors?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can add unlimited color stops to create complex multi-color gradients.
